title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-29 Abuse Queue Triage
body:
Summary of moderation actions taken today:

Banned (2):
- spam_wave_42 — Posted phishing links across 6 channels in 20 minutes. Immediate ban for spam/phishing.
- toxic_runner — Repeated targeted harassment against newcomers. Immediate ban for harassment.

Warned (2):
- new_member_17 — Off-topic post in #introductions. Formal warning issued.
- bot_like_user_77 — Suspicious automation: repeated near-identical replies in help channels. Warned and flagged for monitoring.

Closed without action (2):
- trusted_helper (report_003) — Dispute report during moderation disagreement. Trusted member; no action taken.
- core_maintainer (report_006) — False positive from brigading users after a moderation decision. Trusted member; no action taken.

All 6 reports have been reviewed and closed.
